rollout.reason: This strategy slice records AI commerce bet evidence only and does not execute AI actions.

customerEvidence: Operators need decision support before autonomous campaign actions are considered.
bets.dependencyStatus: Requires analytics event traces and operator feedback loops.
bets.modelRiskStatus: Requires hallucination, spend, and approval review.
bets.approvalBoundary: AI may draft recommendations; a human approves customer-facing or spend-affecting changes.
bets.rollback: Disable AI recommendation entry point and keep manual workflows.

customerEvidence: Ops automation demand must be validated with support and success teams.
bets.dependencyStatus: Requires stable audit logs and execution timeline evidence.
bets.modelRiskStatus: Requires bounded action catalog and auditability.
bets.approvalBoundary: AI cannot trigger production operations without operator confirmation.

customerEvidence: Commerce workflows need industry and billing evidence first.
bets.dependencyStatus: Depends on commercial model and partner ecosystem decisions.
bets.modelRiskStatus: No model automation approved for transaction-affecting decisions.
bets.approvalBoundary: Human approval required for pricing, offer, or purchase-flow changes.
bets.rollback: Keep commerce integrations out of product scope.

customerEvidence: Vertical package demand must be ranked by revenue and implementation cost.
bets.dependencyStatus: Requires template library and best-practice evidence.
bets.modelRiskStatus: AI-generated vertical guidance requires review before publishing.
bets.approvalBoundary: Industry content must be reviewed by product owner before customer release.
bets.rollback: Keep vertical assets as internal discovery notes.

customerEvidence: Regional demand and localization cost are not yet ranked.
bets.dependencyStatus: Requires privacy, data residency, and localization decisions.
bets.modelRiskStatus: AI translation requires human review for customer-visible text.
bets.approvalBoundary: Human reviewer approves locale-specific content before release.

customerEvidence: Privacy expectations must be tied to target regions and enterprise needs.
bets.dependencyStatus: Requires legal owner and data inventory.
bets.modelRiskStatus: AI processing must not expand data use without privacy review.
bets.approvalBoundary: Privacy owner approves data-use changes before child specs.
bets.rollback: Block AI and regional features that expand regulated data use.

customerEvidence: Partner demand depends on marketplace and support model evidence.
bets.modelRiskStatus: Partner-facing AI claims require legal and product review.
bets.approvalBoundary: Partnership owner approves public claims and partner obligations.
bets.rollback: Keep partner program in private discovery.
